note: Core lessons from markdown.engineering (v2.1.88), verified and updated against live v2.1.90/v2.1.91/v2.1.92/v2.1.94/v2.1.96/v2.1.100/v2.1.101/v2.1.104/v2.1.107/v2.1.108/v2.1.109/v2.1.110/v2.1.111 binaries.
